headline: Apple's Influence At 'Highest Levels In Chinese Leadership' Behind Easing Of China's COVID-19 Policy, Says Analyst
summary: Apple, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) may have a role to play in China’s relenting on its strict “zero COVID-19” policy, an analyst said on Friday.

headline: Why New Moms Are Getting Stressed Out On Parenting-Based Social Media: Study
summary: A new study published by Pepperdine University reveals that mothers who spend more time reading mom-focused social media content experience higher stress.

headline: Elton John Leaving Twitter Because Of The Rocket Man: Here's How Elon Musk Responds
